content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.researchgate.net/post/Why_total_Faradaic_efficiency_is_dropped_at_low_overpotential_during_electrochemical_CO2_reduction", "source_title": "Why total Faradaic efficiency is dropped at low ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "University of Texas at Austin Question Asked 3 March 2020 Why total Faradaic efficiency is dropped at low overpotential during electrochemic...", "direct_quote": "University of Texas at Austin Question Asked 3 March 2020 Why total Faradaic efficiency is dropped at low overpotential during electrochemical CO2 reduction?", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Hi guys I'm studying electrochemical CO2 reduction using the Ag nanowire it shows very low total Faradaic efficiency (11% FE of CO, 48% FE o...", "direct_quote": "Hi guys I'm studying electrochemical CO2 reduction using the Ag nanowire it shows very low total Faradaic efficiency (11% FE of CO, 48% FE of H2) when I conduct the experiment at -0.6V (rhe) Is there anyone suffering from same problem?", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Related Publications A N-doped carbonized wood membrane (N-CWM) is fabricated and directly used as a self-supported electrode for efficient ...", "direct_quote": "Related Publications A N-doped carbonized wood membrane (N-CWM) is fabricated and directly used as a self-supported electrode for efficient CO2 electroreduction in aqueous solution with a maximum CO Faradaic efficiency (FE) of 78% at -0.68 V versus r", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
